class.name: ARCoachingOverlay
class.brief_description: A standard Apple onboarding overlay that guides users during AR session setup.
class.description: Wraps ARCoachingOverlayView, which provides a system-standard UI that instructs users to move their device to initialize tracking. Attach to a session with [method attach_to_session] and configure the [member goal] to match your AR experience. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS, the system provides its own spatial onboarding UX. On macOS, there is no equivalent. The type exists on all platforms for API consistency but is a no-op outside iOS.

method.name: attach_to_session
method.description: Attaches the overlay to [param session] so the system can present coaching UI for that session.

method.name: set_active
method.description: Shows or hides the coaching overlay. When [param animated] is [code]true[/code], the transition uses the system animation.

members.member: When enabled, the overlay appears automatically whenever the session needs coaching.
The type of guidance the overlay should provide. See [enum Goal].

signal.name: coaching_did_deactivate
signal.description: Emitted when the coaching overlay finishes and dismisses itself.

constants.constant: Guide the user until general tracking quality is sufficient.
Guide the user until a horizontal plane is found.
Guide the user until a vertical plane is found.
Guide the user until any supported plane is found.
Guide the user until geo tracking becomes available.
